response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with strong leadership, mentoring, and architectural skills. However, he critically fails the minimum qualification of 8 years of C++ programming, possessing only about 7 months of professional C++ experience. His background is heavily anchored in web platforms, TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, rather than the deep hardware, networking, and C++ compute infrastructure required for this role.
strengths: Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and teaching engineering best practices like TDD and CI/CD.
Proven experience building high-throughput distributed systems, including microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated ability to own and drive large architectural projects, including founding an open-source k8s-deployed platform.
concerns: Critically lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming experience, having only brief professional exposure.
Experience is heavily skewed towards web, mobile, and application-level platforms rather than foundational cloud compute infrastructure.
Lacks deep, demonstrated experience with internal hardware architecture, compute technologies, or low-level networking.
